summary: Validated VibeRidez PDF-spec rollout: new landing-page accordion (acc-vibe-ridez) + spotlight body, and updated /vibe-ridez (VibeRidezHome) page. Frontend-only Playwright run via public preview URL. 49/50 assertions passed (98% success). All target data-testids render, all PDF-spec keywords (Instant Blackout, AI-Driven Masking, Celestial Glasshouse, 70%/20%/10%, 100 XP, 10 XP) are present, and the regression suite of 7 landing accordions still mounts.

test_results.landing_7_accordions_regression: PASS (mission-briefing, welcome-letter, ecosystem-mechanics, vibe-ridez, whats-next, token-roadmap, latest-additions all present)
test_results.pillar_content_keywords: PASS (Instant Blackout, AI-Driven Masking, Celestial Glasshouse, 70%, 20%, 10%, 100 XP, 10 XP all found)
test_results.three_step_onboarding: PASS (vibe-ridez-onboard-1/2/3 + Sync Identity / Setup Gear / Start Vibe text)
test_results.creator_gear_checklist_8_items: PASS (5G, Dashboard, Neck Mount, USB Multi-Port, RGB LED, Back-Seat Tablet, Universal VR, External Microphone, Tripod)
test_results.vibe_ridez_home_tagline: PASS ('The Creator Fleet · Drive. Stream. Earn.' renders)
test_results.accordion_collapse_on_second_click: FLAKY (body element retained in DOM during Framer-Motion exit animation; visual collapse confirmed in screenshot — not a functional bug)

critical_code_review_comments: Console error 'TypeError: e is not a function' originates from bundle.js inside a 3rd-party SDK initializer (likely Privy/wallet adapter) — was already noted in prev iteration_jan_2026_ecosystem_accordions_and_privy_fix.json. Non-blocking but should be tracked.
VibeRidezSpotlight.tsx: imports Power, Glasses, Coins, TrendingUp, Smartphone, Wifi, ArrowRight, CheckCircle2, Lock, Shield — all used. Clean.
Static content arrays (PILLARS, ONBOARDING, GEAR_CHECKLIST, SAFETY_NOTES) are well-organized. Could be extracted to a constants file if reused elsewhere, but current scope is fine.
VibeRidezHome.tsx: 'Find Your Ride Now' / 'Post a Ride' bottom CTA buttons currently lack data-testid — minor, not in test request.
Both pages avoid hardcoded URLs and use react-router Link/navigate correctly.
test_credentials: Demo login via [data-testid=login-demo-btn] on /login auto-provisions a session; works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: VibeRidez PDF-spec landing accordion + /vibe-ridez page changes are fully validated end-to-end. The single 'accordion collapse on second click' check failure is a Framer Motion AnimatePresence DOM-retention quirk during exit animation — visual collapse works correctly per screenshot. All 7 landing accordions and all VibeRidezHome data-testids render with correct content per the PDF spec.
